title: Fix ADV worktree registry cleanup drift

tasks.title: T1 — Add canonical change-branch inference helper. Implement `inferChangeIdFromBranch(branch)` near worktree state/branch utilities. Return non-empty suffix for `change/<id>`, otherwise undefined. Add focused unit tests for valid, empty, and non-change branches. TDD intent: inline. Delegation hint: inline_required.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added `inferChangeIdFromBranch(branch)` in `tools/worktree/state.ts`, returning non-empty suffixes for canonical `change/<id>` branches and undefined for empty/non-change branches. Added focused helper tests. Verification: RED failed with helper missing; GREEN `pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/worktree/state-session-lifecycle.test.ts` passed 7 tests.

error_recovery.last_error: adv_run_test TypeError persisted; shell fallback used for red/green evidence and checkpoint verification.
error_recovery.next_strategy: Use shell fallback for focused verification if ADV evidence tool continues to TypeError.

tasks.title: T2 — Populate `changeId` in worktree registry write paths. Update primary create, inline-mode registration, forked-session registration, legacy migration `addSession`, and direct git-census workflow update to pass explicit or inferred change id. Add tests that registry update payloads contain expected `changeId`. TDD intent: inline. Delegation hint: inline_required.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated primary `advWorktreeCreate`, inline-mode registration, forked-session registration, legacy SQLite migration `addSession`, and git-census adoption to populate inferred `changeId` for canonical `change/<id>` branches. Added tests proving create and migration registry update payloads include changeId. Verification: RED failed with undefined/omitted changeId; GREEN `pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/worktree/index-create.test.ts src/tools/worktree/migration.test.ts` passed 13 tests.

error_recovery.last_error: One mistyped shell command `pnm --version`; corrected by running intended `pnpm exec vitest ...`.

tasks.title: T3 — Add triage visibility for registry entries missing change id. Extend `OrphanClass`/triage output with `registry_missing_change_id` for `change/...` registry records without `changeId`, including safe diagnostic recommended fix text. Add tests. TDD intent: inline. Delegation hint: inline_required.
tasks.implementation_summary: Extended worktree triage with `registry_missing_change_id` for canonical `change/...` registry records lacking owning `changeId`, including safe diagnostic remediation text. Added focused triage regression test. Verification: RED failed because class was absent; GREEN `pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/worktree/triage.test.ts` passed 6 tests.

tasks.title: T4 — Final verification and related scan. Run focused worktree/branch integration/triage tests, related scan for remaining `addSession(... branch ... path)` or `addWorktreeSessionUpdate` calls without change id, then `pnpm run check`, `pnpm test`, and `pnpm run build` from `plugin/`. TDD intent: separate_verification. Delegation hint: delegate_allowed.
tasks.implementation_summary: Ran focused verification for state helper, worktree create registration, migration adoption, triage, and branch integration. Related scan reviewed `addSession(` and `addWorktreeSessionUpdate` call sites; remaining registry writes include inferred change id or are definitions/tests/benchmark. Formatted touched files. Verification passed: `pnpm run check`, full `pnpm test` (164 files passed, 2 skipped; 2990 tests passed, 5 skipped), and `pnpm run build`.

error_recovery.last_error: Initial `pnpm run check` failed on formatting for three touched files; formatted touched files and reran check successfully.

attempts.error: Prettier format check failed for `src/tools/worktree/index.ts`, `migration.ts`, and `state-session-lifecycle.test.ts`.
attempts.diagnosis: Formatting drift from patches, not semantic failure.
attempts.fix_tried: Ran Prettier on touched files and reran `pnpm run check`.

tdd_reclassification.reason: Restore prep-approved TDD intent for final verification task; task title explicitly states `TDD intent: separate_verification`, but metadata was normalized to inline.
tdd_reclassification.approval_evidence: User approved prep with reply `approve`; task title persisted in ADV state explicitly says `TDD intent: separate_verification`.

proposal.notes: User requested execution after bug explanation. Problem confirmed: ADV-created worktree registry entries can miss owning changeId, making safe cleanup fail closed with branch_not_in_registry/INTEGRATION_REQUIRED.

discovery.notes: Discovery completed from live code evidence. Evidence: advWorktreeCreate calls addSession without changeId; addSession accepts optional changeId but writes undefined when omitted; verifyBranchIntegration rejects missing changeId as branch_not_in_registry; triage does not flag registry records missing changeId. Agreement objective: keep safety gate strict while ensuring registry records carry owning change id and triage exposes drift.

design.notes: Design validator verdict: VALIDATED with required adjustments. Adjustments incorporated: fix all 5 registry write paths (create, inline, forked, legacy addSession, git census), add canonical branch inference helper, keep delete safety strict, add registry_missing_change_id triage class with diagnostic recommendation. No user-value tradeoff or contract-compromise risk.

planning.notes: User approved prep with reply `approve`. Task graph has 4 tasks, validation passed with 0 errors. No judgment calls surfaced; choices are local correctness/safety.

execution.notes: Execution complete. 4/4 tasks done with checkpoint commits. Validation passed with 0 errors. Verification passed: focused worktree/branch integration tests (36 tests), related scan for registry write paths, `pnpm run check`, full `pnpm test` (2990 tests), and `pnpm run build`. Worktree clean.

acceptance.notes: User accepted delivered work with reply `accept`. Review validation passed with 0 errors. Worktree clean. Verification passed: focused tests (36), `pnpm run check`, full `pnpm test` (2990 tests), and `pnpm run build`. REVIEW_FINDINGS: no blockers, issues, suggestions, or open questions; remaining warnings are non-blocking no-delta/proposal-section warnings.

release.notes: User signed off release with reply `sign off`. Archive preflight: conformance status has no conformance specs configured. Validation passed with 0 errors. Worktree clean. Verification remains: focused tests (36), `pnpm run check`, full `pnpm test` (2990 tests), and `pnpm run build` passed.
